THE GROWVE ADVANTAGE

Stop reacting to shipping problems Start preventing them.

Growve helps teams identify delivery risks, recover failed shipments, and stay ahead of operational issues before they impact customers or revenue.

Catch delivery issues before they become returns.Monitor NDR trends, delivery exceptions, customer availability issues, and courier performance in real time. Take action before failed deliveries turn into costly RTOs.
NDR reason breakdown18 open NDRs · take action before auto-RTO triggers
Customer not available7

30%

Wrong address / not found4

44%

Customer refused delivery3

22%

Phone not reachable5

88%

Door locked / no one home6

67%

Manage shipments from anywhere.Access shipment performance, delivery updates, order activity, and business metrics through a mobile-first experience designed for teams on the move.

THE PLATFORM

Built for teams that ship at scale.

Connect your sales channels, automate logistics workflows, and manage operations from a single platform designed for growing businesses.

Connect Store

Integrate Your Sales Platforms

Connect your marketplaces and stores to automatically sync orders, inventory, and tracking in real time.

a

Amazon India

Marketplace

Sync orders from Amazon.in marketplace automatically.

Connect marketplaces & stores in minutes.Automatically sync orders, inventory updates, and shipment activity across all connected sales channels.
Manage every order from one workspace.Create shipments, monitor statuses, coordinate fulfillment, and keep operations moving from a single dashboard.
THE GROWVE ADVANTAGE

Logistics shouldn't require five different tools.

Built to help growing brands streamline execution, improve delivery outcomes, and stay focused on what matters most.

CORE CAPABILITIES

One platform. Every shipment workflow.

Manage shipments, monitor performance, recover failed deliveries, and optimize operations from a unified logistics workspace.

Centralized Shipment ManagementCreate, manage, and monitor shipments from a single dashboard designed to keep operations organized at every stage.
Real-Time Operational InsightsTrack delivery performance, transit times, shipment volume, and courier efficiency with live logistics analytics.

CORE CAPABILITIES

Everything you need to run logistics efficiently.

From pickup to delivery, get complete visibility into shipment movement, courier performance, and business-critical logistics data.

Smart Courier Allocation
Choose the best courier for every shipment based on delivery performance, cost, serviceability, and historical success rates.
Returns & RTO Control
Reduce return losses with complete visibility into return reasons, RTO trends, and recovery opportunities.
Real-Time Shipment Tracking
Track every shipment milestone from pickup to final delivery through a unified tracking experience.
Weight Dispute Protection
Identify billing discrepancies, monitor weight changes, and prevent unnecessary courier charges.
G

GROWVE

LOGISTICS

Explore the Growve Platform
Discover the tools that power smarter shipping operations.
Performance Analytics
Measure courier performance, delivery rates, transit times, NDR trends, and operational efficiency.
Marketplace Integrations
Connect stores and marketplaces to sync orders, inventory, tracking updates, and shipment data automatically.
Billing & Reconciliation
Manage shipping costs, invoices, wallet transactions, and courier billing from one place.
NDR Recovery Automation
Recover failed deliveries automatically through intelligent workflows, customer outreach, and retry recommendations.
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Questions and Answers

Learn how Growve helps you streamline shipping operations, automate workflows, and manage logistics from a single platform.

You can sign up, connect your sales channels, and book your first shipment in under 15 minutes. Our onboarding flow walks you through every step.
Growve integrates with Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, Flipkart, Magento, and other major marketplaces and storefronts via direct APIs.
Smart Courier Allocation evaluates cost, transit time, serviceability, NDR history, and SLA performance for every shipment in real time.
Yes — all shipments across every connected courier appear in a unified dashboard with live milestones, ETAs, and exception alerts.
NDR Recovery workflows automatically contact customers, reschedule deliveries, and confirm addresses before a shipment turns into an RTO.
Performance analytics cover delivery rate, first-attempt success, transit times, NDR trends, courier comparison, and cost per shipment.
Yes — every Growve account includes email and in-app support, with priority support available on growth and enterprise plans.
From a few hundred shipments to millions per month, the Growve platform is built for high-volume operations with enterprise-grade reliability.
G
GET STARTED TODAY

Ready to Growve Logistics

Set up your account, connect your store, and go live instantly. No complex setup, no delays — just faster logistics from day one.
